title: Ensure unique bean names in @Configuration classes
description: Beans defined in a Spring @Configuration class must each have a unique name. Duplicate bean names can cause unexpected behavior and make the application context ambiguous, leading to runtime errors and maintenance challenges.
recommendation: Assign a unique name to every bean in @Configuration classes to avoid conflicts and ensure predictable dependency injection.

checks.message: Assign a unique name to every bean in @Configuration classes to avoid conflicts
